caption: In a professional meeting room setting, members of the "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" are gathered around a table. A banner at the bottom of the scene reads "ORCA," "April 12, 2019," and "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage." In the beginning, several men and women are seated, including a man in a dark suit and glasses on the left and a man with a grey beard in a suit and tie. On the table are water bottles, papers, and a red thermos. The scene shifts as the camera pans and zooms, momentarily blurring the figures in the upper right. By the end, the focus moves to a group of people standing, including a woman in a red blazer and a woman in a white cardigan and black top, while a man in a dark suit stands beside them.
